content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.collective_bridge
FILE: cosmos/core/collective_bridge.py (870 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Collective Bridge - Collective to Swarm Communication.

AGI v1.8.4 Feature: Bridge between the deliberation collective and
individual shadow agents in the swarm.

Enables:
- Dispatching consensus decisions to appropriate agents
- Agents escalating issues to the collective
- Cross-collective c

CLASSES:
- DispatchPriority(Enum): Priority levels for collective dispatches.
- EscalationReason(Enum): Reasons an agent might escalate to the collective.
- ConsensusResult: Result from a deliberation collective.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- DispatchRequest: A request to dispatch work to an agent.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- EscalationRequest: A request from an agent to escalate to the collective.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- VoteRequest: A request from an agent for a collective vote.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- CollectiveState: State of a collective for syncing.
- CollectiveBridge: Bridge between deliberation collective and shadow agent swarm.

Enables:
- Dispa
  Methods: def connect_nexus(self, nexus) -> None
  Methods: def connect_deliberation_room(self, room) -> None
  Methods: def connect_a2a_mesh(self, mesh) -> None
  Methods: async def dispatch_consensus(self, consensus: ConsensusResult, target_agents: list[str], priority: D
  Methods: async def assign_from_deliberation(self, task: dict, winning_agent: str, context: Optional[dict]=Non
  Methods: def register_dispatch_handler(self, agent_id: str, handler: Callable[[DispatchRequest], Awaitable[di
  Methods: async def get_dispatch_result(self, dispatch_id: str, timeout: float=60.0) -> Optional[dict]
  Methods: async def escalate_to_collective(self, agent_id: str, reason: EscalationReason, issue: dict, context

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def create_collective_bridge(data_dir: str='./data/collective_bridge') -> CollectiveBridge
- def get_bridge() -> CollectiveBridge
